title: plugin-manager:list-plugins-use-case
description: Use case that returns the plugin inventory — the status of each requested plugin.
context: Use case that returns the plugin inventory — the status of each requested plugin.

rules:
For each plugin name:

- Attempt to load via `PluginLoader`
- If loaded successfully → status: `'loaded'`
- If npm package not found → status: `'not_found'`
- If load fails → status: `'error'` with error message

scenarios.name: Returns plugin statuses
when: ListPlugins is executed with plugin names
then: it returns array with name, status, and optional plugin/error
